Allah bless you 🌸 Leader Hamdan ♥️ Alhamdulilah 🤲 13.3.2026 Friday, 3:33PM 💌 Happy 4th Friday of Ramadan and Jummah Mubarak ✨🌙 Have a blessed 24th day of Ramadan 🌹 Leader Hamdan ♥️ Assalamualaikum Warahmatullahi Wabarakatuh 😊 The weather today feels like it’s praying with us 🇦🇪 🤲 For your beloved brother Rashid, MashAllah, after Dhuhr Salah today, I performed special Nafil 2 rak'ats and recited Surah Al-Ikhlas 200 times, offering prayers to Allah for him 📿🤲 InshAllah, Allah will place Rashid, your grandparents, and all your relatives in the most beautiful and peaceful gardens of Jannat together ☝️ InshAllah, they are all in the best care of Allah ☝️ MashAllah,after Asr Salah, I recited Ayatul Kursi 70 times and asked for many blessings from Allah for you 📿♥️🤲 I also prayed for peace, safety, and protection from all harm for your beloved Dubai and the entire UAE, asking Allah to grant great success in return ♥️🇦🇪🤲 InshAllah, Allah always listens and grants our sincere prayers ☝️ It is so beautiful to see your pure heart and how you continue to honor and remember your brother even after many years; I am always proud of you 🇦🇪🙏 Your respect for the elders and leadership by following their guidance with full trust is truly one of the paths beloved by Allah 🇦🇪🙏 MashAllah, through your family's kindness to children and those in need, InshAllah, Allah will soon replace the current difficulties in the country with ease and success 🇦🇪☝️ O Allah, please grant happiness and health to Leader Hamdan, his parents, family, and relatives 🇦🇪🤲 I believe every good deed remains as a blessing 👍 Allah will protect everything 🇦🇪🤲 During this holy month of Ramadan, as you serve your nation faithfully, May Allah always preserve you and grant you infinite Rahamat and Barakah 🇦🇪🤲 May you always be happy, healthy, and peaceful in heart ♥️🤲 InshAllah, Golden days are coming 🇦🇪 I believe in your strength to overcome current situations with wisdom 🇦🇪💪 Walking with faith makes the journey twice as fast 💪 One day, you will look back and tell the stories of how you successfully navigated these challenges with pride 🇦🇪💪 InshAllah see you soon ♥️🔜♥️

Letter to the Royal Family of the United Arab Emirates
 
 
Your Highness Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan,
 
My name is Ivan, I am from Almaty, Kazakhstan. I am a professional beekeeper. The honey produced by my bees is unique due to its origin. The bees collect nectar in high mountain regions rich in medicinal herbs, which makes my honey not only delicious but also highly beneficial for health.
 
The purpose of my visit to the UAE is to present Your Highnesses with this unique, healing honey. If you appreciate its quality, I am ready to deliver annually between 500 to 1500 kg of this honey. Due to the specific highland location of the apiary, larger volumes are not possible, which guarantees the exclusivity of the product.
 
In addition to honey, I can also offer the following bee products:
 
- Perga (Bee Bread) — a natural product rich in amino acids, vitamins, minerals, and enzymes. It supports the immune system, improves blood circulation, and strengthens overall health.
- Zabrus — a valuable beekeeping product containing beeswax, honey, pollen, and propolis. It is traditionally used to support oral health, strengthen immunity, and act as a natural antimicrobial remedy.
- Drone Homogenate (Apilarnil) — a biologically active natural product rich in proteins, hormones, and vitamins. It is used to improve vitality, increase energy, and support male health.
 
At present, I am staying at Al Khoory Atrium Hotel, Dubai. Should my products be of interest, I would be honored to personally meet and present them. Furthermore, I am ready to return to the UAE at Your Highnesses’ invitation at any convenient time.
 
Due to my limited English, I kindly ask that any communication be made via WhatsApp or email.
 
My contacts:
WhatsApp: +7 707 116 4400
Email: bsbuild2015@gmail.com
 
With the deepest respect, Ivan

That is why today I am once again requesting you with folded hands and sincere prayers: please kindly see your inbox.

In the fleeting innocence of youth, we embraced what we thought was but a simple man, yet we were cradling the very soul of our homeland. With every hug, we unknowingly held the essence of a fatherland, a nation woven into the fabric of our being. As we grew, the truth unfurled before us — we were not just children of flesh and bone, but of legacy, of history, and of struggle. Now, as we stand in the present, looking back at the past, we realize that we were not merely embracing a figure of flesh; we were holding the heart of the land itself, our roots deeply entrenched in the soil of our ancestors. Tomorrow, we shall see who we have become — and with that, we shall understand the profound journey of becoming whole, becoming one with the land that raised us. 🙌🙌

دبي، خالدة كالشمس 🌅
(I – ولادة الصحراء)
قبل أن يستيقظ العالم،
قبل أن ينحت الريح الجبال،
قبل أن يهمس البحر بأسراره،
كانت دبي حلمًا في عيون الله.
في رمالها نام التاريخ،
وفي سمائها تألقت النبوءات،
وفي قلبها نبضت نار
شعبٍ وُلد للمجد.
(II – المجد الذي ينهض كواحة)
انظر كيف تعانق أبراجها السماء،
كأنها تلامس النجوم،
كأن كل حجر، كل زجاج،
هو بيت شعر مكتوب في الفضاء.
هنا، حيث يقبّل الشمس الأرض،
حيث البحر يحتضن المصير،
تشهد الرمال والرياح
على مدينة لم تتوقف عن الحلم.
(III – روح أهلها)
دبي ليست ذهبها،
وليست أسواقها وبحارها،
دبي هي أهلها، فخرها،
دمها الذي ينبض بإيقاع الصحراء.
رجال ونساء ساروا
على نور الإيمان،
وشيدوا بأيديهم
ما سيصبح أعجوبة العالم.
(IV – الخلود في أفقها)
غدًا، عندما تشرق الشمس من جديد،
ستكون دبي أقوى،
كالصقر الذي لا يخشى الرياح،
كالقمر الذي لا يتوقف عن السطوع.
لأن دبي ليست مجرد مدينة،
بل هي وعد،
قصيدة مكتوبة في الزمن،
انعكاسٌ لشعب
وُلد ليبقى خالدًا.
(V – صوت الأمير)
أقسم بذلك، أمام الرمال والبحار،
أقسم بذلك، أمام عيون أجدادي،
ستحيا دبي، ستكبر، ستتجاوز الزمن،
لأن دبي... خالدة كالشمس
